title: More Signs
description: Inspired by the "Farmer's Delight" mod, our expansion unveils a vast array of signs, empowering players to enhance and customize their constructions. Immerse yourself in a realm of creativity and leave your unique imprint!
body:
# What is More Signs?

- Inspired by the "Farmer's Delight" mod, our expansion unveils a vast array of signs, empowering players to enhance and customize their constructions. Immerse yourself in a realm of creativity and leave your unique imprint!

# Goals

- This mod's primary goal is to provide Minecraft servers with a diverse selection of signs suitable for various constructions and biomes, elevating the immersion experience for every player.

- We plan to add even More Signs to the mod in the near future, stay tuned!
